description.ko: 끊임없는 네온 불빛과 영원히 내리는 비 아래에서 첨단 기술과 거친 거리 문화가 충돌하는 미래 지향적인 도시 풍경의 압도적인 비전입니다.
description.en: A breathtaking vision of a futuristic urban landscape where advanced technology and gritty street culture collide beneath a canopy of endless neon lights and perpetual rain.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a sprawling cyberpunk megacity at night under a heavy downpour, vibrant neon signs in electric blue and hot pink reflecting on wet asphalt, towering skyscrapers with holographic advertisements, flying vehicles weaving through dense urban layers, high-tech low-life aesthetic, hyper-realistic, 8k resolution, volumetric lighting, synthwave atmosphere.
